_comment: Auto-updated every 2 minutes by /loop. Holds the freshest news headlines for the trivia ticker. Capped at 20 items, newest first.

items.text: TVK leading 107 of 234 seats — Vijay's debut party is 11 seats short of the 118-mark for an outright majority.
VK Ramkumar (TVK) wins Anna Nagar with 71,375 votes, defeating DMK's N. Chitrarasu by 21,363.
CM M.K. Stalin continues to trail in his own seat Kolathur to TVK newcomer V.S. Babu.
